remaining_tasks.name: OPTIONAL: gsd-plan-checker on the 2 plans (intentionally skipped at pause — plans are UNVERIFIED by the checker)
Execute 02-01: BLOCKING local schema migration gate (participants+votes), AvailabilityGrid, insert-only submitResponse, vote view + /thanks (VOTE-01/02/03/07)
Execute 02-02: token-verified updateResponse upsert + edit route + same-device auto-load; then BLOCKING Neon migration + prod redeploy + human prod smoke test (VOTE-05/06)

human_actions_pending.action: When executing 02-02: run `npm run db:migrate` against production Neon for the new participants/votes tables BEFORE/at the prod redeploy
human_actions_pending.context: neon-http will 500 on every vote write in prod if the tables are missing (RESEARCH Pitfall 6). Works fine locally regardless.

human_actions_pending.action: When executing 02-02: human production smoke test at the deploy checkpoint (submit a vote, edit it, confirm same-device auto-load)
human_actions_pending.context: 02-02 is a non-autonomous plan with a blocking deploy human-verify checkpoint, matching Phase 1's deploy pattern.

decisions.decision: Paused at the plan->execute boundary; auto-chain (`--chain --auto`) was stopped before execute-phase per user request
decisions.rationale: Cleanest GSD seam: Phase 2 fully designed + planned + committed, before the expensive code-writing stage
So resume does NOT auto-advance discuss->plan->execute; resume is an explicit /gsd-execute-phase 02

decisions.decision: Planner split insert-only first-submit (02-01) from all return/edit paths through the updateResponse upsert (02-02)
decisions.rationale: A same-device re-submit must UPDATE not duplicate (SPEC Round-2 / D2-04/D2-05); the original split risked duplicate participant rows

decisions.decision: Added VOTE-07 to ROADMAP Phase 2 Requirements + success criteria
decisions.rationale: VOTE-07 was added by the 01-04 revision after the roadmap was written; phase_req_ids and the coverage gate now include it

next_action: Run /gsd-execute-phase 02 (or first /gsd-plan-phase 02 review / plan-checker if you want the plans verified before building). Execution starts with 02-01 Task 1, the BLOCKING local schema migration gate.
context_notes: Full GSD pipeline ran this session: /gsd-spec-phase 2 -> /gsd-discuss-phase 2 --chain --auto -> /gsd-plan-phase 2 --auto, which fanned out researcher + ui-researcher + ui-checker + pattern-mapper + planner (all sonnet except planner=opus). All five design artifacts + both plans are committed. The plan-checker (gsd-plan-checker) was deliberately NOT spawned because the user asked to pause before execution; the plans are therefore unverified by the checker but were self-consistent at write time. Local Postgres is the docker-compose container lfg-db-1 (up, healthy) on :5432; DB-backed vitest needs DATABASE_URL exported (vitest does not auto-load .env.local). neon-http has NO interactive transactions — all writes use the createPoll two-statement pattern / single onConflictDoUpdate upsert.
